mapper.update: MERGE INTO FCM_TOKENS t USING ( SELECT #{uuid} AS uuid_val, #{userId} AS user_id, #{fcmToken} AS fcm_token FROM DUAL ) s ON (t.UUID = s.uuid_val AND t.USER_ID = s.user_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.FCM_TOKEN = s.fcm_token, t.LAST_LOGIN = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( TOKEN_ID, USER_ID, FCM_TOKEN, DEVICE_TYPE, LAST_LOGIN, UUID ) VALUES ( SEQ_FCM_TOKEN.NEXTVAL, s.user_id, s.fcm_token, 'WEB', SYSDATE, s.uuid_val )
